recommended_tests.test_name: Complete Blood Count with Absolute Eosinophil Count

patient_input: Mam I am 28 year old male. I recently returned from 2 months working in plantation area in Kerala. From 3 weeks I have skin rash mainly around wrists and ankles, very itchy. Also having mild cough and wheezing. Stool test showed worm eggs. I feel generally weak and appetite is poor.

patient_input: Doctor I am 72 year old male, diabetic for 20 years. From 2 days I am very confused and extremely thirsty. My family says I was talking nonsense last night. My sugar reading at home showed HI on glucometer which means very high. I am not vomiting, just very sleepy and dry mouth.

patient_input: I am 38 year old female. After thyroid gland surgery 3 months back my hands and feet have become very numb and tingling. I get painful muscle cramps. My lips and fingers twitch. My face muscle twitches when doctor taps my cheekbone. I feel very anxious.

Elevated lactate indicates bowel ischaemia from vascular compromise in volvulus requiring emergency surgery

patient_input: I am 45 year old male. From 4 months having progressive breathlessness. I also have chronic cough. Lately I notice my fingers have become clubbed. I do not smoke. My PFT shows a restrictive pattern and my DLCO is very low. HRCT shows honeycombing pattern mainly at lung bases.

patient_input: Doctor I am 50 year old female from Chandigarh. From 6 months I have had rash all over body appearing suddenly with peeling of skin and redness. patient_input: I am 30 year old male. I took anti-epileptic tablet (carbamazepine) prescribed 8 weeks back. patient_input: Doctor I am 58 year old male. From 6 months I have severe pain in my abdomen especially after eating. The pain is so bad I am afraid to eat and I lost 12 kg weight. patient_input: I am 44 year old male, security supervisor in Hyderabad. From 3 months my BP is very difficult to control at 185/110 even with medicines. My potassium is always normal but my kidney ultrasound shows one kidney is smaller than other. Creatinine is slightly raised at 1.6.

recommended_tests.reason: To detect increased peak systolic velocity and resistive index suggesting renal artery stenosis causing renovascular hypertension

patient_input: Doctor I am 33 year old male from Uttarakhand. From 2 months I have very swollen lymph glands in my neck and armpit. I also have patches of light coloured skin with loss of sensation and thickened nerves near my elbow. The skin patch has reduced sweating. No fever.

To assess baseline health and detect anaemia of chronic infection from prolonged mycobacterial disease

patient_input: I am 8 year old boy. My parents are speaking. He got injured by a rusty nail in the garden 10 days back. The wound was not properly cleaned. Autonomic dysfunction from tetanus toxin causes sweating, hypertension and fluid imbalances requiring monitoring

patient_input: Doctor, I am 36 year old female. From 5 months I have chronic watery diarrhoea, 10 to 12 times daily with no blood. I feel very bloated. I have lost 8 kg. Colonoscopy showed normal mucosa but biopsy was taken. I use NSAIDs for my joint pain regularly. I am on omeprazole also.

Elevated in microscopic colitis despite macroscopically normal colon helping to direct biopsy sampling

patient_input: I am 54 year old male. From 1 year my walking is very imbalanced, I stagger like drunk person. My speech has become slurred. My hands are shaking especially when I try to do things. patient_input: Doctor I am 26 year old male. From 6 months I fall asleep suddenly and uncontrollably even during talking or eating. I cannot control this sleep. Hypothyroidism causes excessive daytime sleepiness and must be excluded before narcolepsy workup

patient_input: I am 12 year old. My parents say since childhood I always had colds and chest infections, about 8 to 10 per year. My organs are arranged opposite side, heart is on right side. recommended_tests.test_name: High Speed Video Microscopy of Cilia
recommended_tests.reason: Abnormal ciliary beat pattern and frequency confirms ciliary dysfunction in PCD
To detect bronchiectasis from recurrent infections and assess severity of lung disease in PCD
To detect obstructive pattern from mucus plugging and bronchiectasis and establish baseline lung function

patient_input: Doctor I am 48 year old male with HIV from 5 years, CD4 is only 45. From 3 weeks I have very bad headache, neck stiffness, fever and photophobia. My thinking is slow. Antifungal tablets were started at outside hospital but I came here as I am not improving. I feel very unwell.

To detect cryptococcomas, hydrocephalus and assess for other opportunistic CNS infections in severely immunocompromised HIV patient

patient_input: I am 40 year old male. From 8 months I have blood spotting from my nose and mouth. I have spider-like red veins on my lips, tongue and fingers. My mother and sister also have same red spots. I recently had a large bleed in my lung and blood was coming in my stool from intestine.

patient_input: I am 38 year old male. From 3 months my right side of face including forehead, upper eyelid and scalp has many cafe-au-lait brown spots and small flesh-colored bumps under skin in various places on body. My right eye is slightly protruding. My mother has similar skin spots. No pain.

To monitor SCLC treatment response and disease progression as cause of paraneoplastic LEMS

To detect delta brush pattern and subclinical seizures characteristic of anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis

patient_input: Doctor I am 70 year old male, retired principal. From 1 year my breathlessness is getting worse slowly. I cannot walk even 100 metres now. My legs are very swollen. patient_input: I am 44 year old female. I have asthma from 10 years and it has become very difficult to control in last 6 months. patient_input: Doctor I am 18 year old female. From 1 year I have been having episodes of severe weakness and muscle cramps especially at night. patient_input: Mam I am 24 year old female teacher from Chennai. From 3 weeks having painless but swollen lymph glands in my neck, very tender on touching. patient_input: I am 47 year old male from Vizag. My routine scan done for stomach pain showed a 3 cm adrenal mass incidentally. I have no symptoms of sweating or high BP episodes. My BP is normal. I am otherwise healthy. My doctor is very worried about this and wants more tests before deciding what to do.

recommended_tests.reason: To exclude pheochromocytoma before any intervention as undiagnosed pheo causes fatal hypertensive crisis during biopsy or surgery
To detect subclinical primary hyperaldosteronism in adrenal incidentaloma even without overt hypokalemia or hypertension
Failure to suppress cortisol below 1.8 mcg/dL suggests autonomous cortisol secretion from adrenal incidentaloma
HU below 10 on unenhanced CT and washout above 60% suggests benign adenoma; higher values or irregular lesion warrants further evaluation for malignancy
Elevated DHEAS suggests adrenal cortical carcinoma secreting androgens in an adrenal incidentaloma

patient_input: Doctor I am 45 year old male. From 3 months I have progressive confusion and I keep forgetting things very fast. I have been having seizures twice. My walking is also imbalanced. My CT scan done at local hospital showed some shadow in right side of brain. I smoke 15 cigarettes daily and had headaches worsening over 3 months.

recommended_tests.reason: Ring-enhancing lesion with central necrosis and surrounding oedema in an adult smoker is glioblastoma until proven otherwise
Elevated choline and reduced NAA with elevated lipid-lactate peak confirms high-grade tumour rather than radiation necrosis or abscess
To distinguish viable tumour from necrosis and assess metabolic activity for grading high-grade glioma
Histopathology and molecular markers (IDH, MGMT, EGFR) are essential for definitive diagnosis and treatment planning
To exclude brain metastasis from occult primary lung or other malignancy as the cause of the cerebral lesion

recommended_tests.test_name: Complete Blood Count and Serum Electrolytes
recommended_tests.reason: To assess baseline status before brain biopsy and evaluate hyponatremia from SIADH common in brain tumours

patient_input: Doctor I am 39 year old male with known HIV from 3 years, CD4 is 55 and viral load is high. From 2 months I have progressive weakness of right hand and difficulty walking. My speech is becoming slower. I also have forgetfulness. MRI shows multiple white matter lesions. No fever.

recommended_tests.reason: Positive JC virus PCR in CSF is diagnostic of progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy in severely immunocompromised HIV patient

recommended_tests.test_name: MRI Brain with Gadolinium (FLAIR and DWI)
recommended_tests.reason: Asymmetric non-enhancing confluent white matter lesions without mass effect on FLAIR are characteristic of PML

recommended_tests.test_name: CD4 Count and HIV Viral Load
recommended_tests.reason: To assess degree of immunosuppression as PML occurs almost exclusively when CD4 is below 100 cells per microlitre
Cryptococcal meningitis causes similar cognitive decline and white matter disease in severely immunosuppressed HIV patients

recommended_tests.test_name: CMV PCR in Blood and CSF
recommended_tests.reason: CMV encephalitis causes similar white matter lesions in advanced HIV and must be distinguished from PML

patient_input: I am 19 year old male, not married. From 1 year I have noticed my left breast is enlarged and tender. I feel embarrassed. I have small testis and never had much facial hair or body hair. My voice also did not change much during puberty. My uncle is infertile.

recommended_tests.reason: 47,XXY karyotype confirms Klinefelter syndrome in a male with gynecomastia, small testes and hypogonadism
Markedly elevated FSH and LH confirm primary testicular failure (hypergonadotropic hypogonadism) in Klinefelter syndrome
Low testosterone confirms hypogonadism causing feminisation, gynecomastia and poor virilisation in Klinefelter syndrome
Azoospermia is nearly universal in Klinefelter syndrome and confirms infertility with possible testicular sperm extraction eligibility
Testosterone deficiency in Klinefelter syndrome causes early osteoporosis requiring baseline bone density assessment
Elevated oestradiol from peripheral aromatisation of androgens drives gynecomastia in Klinefelter syndrome

patient_input: Doctor I am 44 year old male. I had my small bowel removed 2 years back after an accident, only 80 cm of bowel remains. From 6 months I have lost 15 kg, severe diarrhoea 8 to 10 times daily, very dehydrated, and my nutrition is very poor. I need IV fluids constantly now.

recommended_tests.reason: To assess degree of protein malnutrition from intestinal failure in short bowel syndrome
Massive GI losses from short bowel syndrome cause severe electrolyte depletion requiring monitoring and replacement

recommended_tests.test_name: Serum Vitamin D, Vitamin B12, Folate and Zinc
recommended_tests.reason: Multiple nutritional deficiencies from absorptive surface loss in short bowel syndrome require systematic assessment
Metabolic bone disease from calcium and Vitamin D malabsorption in short bowel syndrome requires assessment
Enteric hyperoxaluria from fat malabsorption causes calcium oxalate kidney stones which is common in short bowel syndrome
To calculate stomal or stool output and electrolyte losses guiding oral rehydration solution composition in short bowel syndrome

possible_conditions: Short Bowel Syndrome with Intestinal Failure

patient_input: I am 40 year old male who had sudden cardiac arrest while playing cricket 6 months back. I was resuscitated. Echo done showed very thick heart muscle 28 mm and left ventricular outflow obstruction. My younger brother also has thick heart and fainted twice during exercise. My father died suddenly at 42.

recommended_tests.test_name: Cardiac MRI with Late Gadolinium Enhancement
recommended_tests.reason: To quantify hypertrophy extent, detect myocardial fibrosis and assess LVOTO severity which predicts sudden death risk in HOCM

recommended_tests.test_name: MYBPC3 and MYH7 Gene Panel (Sarcomere Gene Testing)
recommended_tests.reason: Pathogenic sarcomere gene mutations in MYBPC3 or MYH7 confirm hereditary hypertrophic cardiomyopathy and enable family screening
To detect non-sustained VT which is a major risk factor for sudden cardiac death in HOCM requiring ICD implantation

recommended_tests.test_name: Exercise Stress Test (with Blood Pressure Response)
recommended_tests.reason: Abnormal blood pressure response to exercise is an independent risk factor for sudden death in HOCM
To assess arrhythmia inducibility and guide ICD implantation decision in post-cardiac arrest HOCM patient

possible_conditions: Obstructive HOCM with Sudden Death Risk

patient_input: Mam I am 30 year old female. From 1 year I have episodes of very fast heartbeat starting suddenly, lasts 30 to 60 seconds then stops. But now since 2 months I also have breathlessness, right leg swelling and I feel like my chest has pressure. Oxygen was 90% at emergency. I am on estrogen pill for contraception.

recommended_tests.reason: Breathlessness with hypoxia and right leg swelling in a woman on OCP requires urgent CTPA to confirm pulmonary embolism
Elevated D-dimer supports PE diagnosis and when negative has high sensitivity to exclude PE in low-probability cases
To detect DVT as source of pulmonary embolism especially in right leg which is swollen

recommended_tests.test_name: Thrombophilia Screen (Factor V Leiden, Prothrombin Mutation, APS)
recommended_tests.reason: OCP combined with thrombophilia dramatically increases VTE risk requiring screening in a young woman with PE
Right heart strain pattern and RV dilation confirm haemodynamically significant PE requiring risk stratification
Elevated troponin and BNP indicate RV myocardial injury from massive or submassive PE requiring urgent intervention consideration

patient_input: Doctor I am 62 year old male. From 6 months I have severe pain and weakness in both shoulders and hips, mostly pain is very bad in the morning for 2 to 3 hours. I also noticed from 2 weeks I have jaw pain when I chew and my right temple is very tender to touch. I have high fever and lost 5 kg.

recommended_tests.reason: ESR above 50 mm per hour is a major criterion for both GCA and PMR and guides urgency of treatment
Elevated CRP alongside high ESR confirms active large vessel vasculitis in GCA with PMR overlap

recommended_tests.test_name: Temporal Artery Biopsy (Urgent, Before Steroids if Possible)
recommended_tests.reason: Granulomatous panarteritis with giant cells confirms GCA; biopsy window is 2 to 4 weeks after starting steroids
To detect large vessel vasculitis in aorta and its branches in GCA and assess extent of systemic vascular inflammation
Halo sign on temporal artery ultrasound has 77% sensitivity for GCA and can guide biopsy site selection

recommended_tests.test_name: Serum ALP and Liver Function Test
recommended_tests.reason: Elevated ALP from hepatic artery involvement occurs in GCA and supports the systemic vasculitic diagnosis

possible_conditions: Giant Cell Arteritis with Polymyalgia Rheumatica

patient_input: I am 50 year old male with very bad uncontrolled diabetes for 20 years. From 3 months having blurring and distortion in my central vision in both eyes. Objects look wavy when I try to read. Bright lights also cause glare. My sugar control is very poor with HbA1c of 12. I have not visited eye doctor in 5 years.

recommended_tests.reason: To detect areas of capillary non-perfusion, microaneurysms, neovascularisation and macular oedema severity in diabetic retinopathy
To quantify diabetic macular oedema thickness and detect subretinal fluid causing central vision distortion
To document degree of glycaemic control as poor control drives progression of proliferative diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic retinopathy and nephropathy coexist and progressive kidney disease parallels eye disease severity
Hypertension accelerates diabetic retinopathy progression and must be controlled alongside glycaemia

patient_input: Doctor I am 33 year old female. From 6 months I have increased urination and thirst. My blood sugar is normal. My calcium is normal. My urine test shows lot of glucose but blood sugar is only 85. I also have protein and amino acids spilling in urine despite normal kidney function. I feel weak and my bones are aching.

recommended_tests.reason: Glycosuria with euglycaemia confirms proximal tubular dysfunction from impaired glucose reabsorption in Fanconi syndrome
Generalised aminoaciduria from loss of multiple amino acids is a hallmark feature of Fanconi syndrome affecting proximal tubule

recommended_tests.test_name: Urine Phosphate Creatinine Ratio and TmP/GFR
recommended_tests.reason: Low tubular maximum for phosphate reabsorption confirms phosphaturia from proximal tubular dysfunction in Fanconi syndrome
Hypouricaemia from urate wasting occurs in Fanconi syndrome due to defective proximal tubular reabsorption
Wilson's disease is the most common cause of Fanconi syndrome in young adults and must be excluded urgently

recommended_tests.test_name: CLCN5 Gene and Other Tubular Gene Panel
recommended_tests.reason: To detect hereditary causes of Fanconi syndrome including Dent disease, Lowe syndrome and mitochondrial cytopathy
